title: Visual Potions Effects (All languages)
description: Display an icon of the effect(s) of items next to their name
body:
A simple pack that will display an icon of the effect(s) of potions, splash potion, lingering potions and tipped arrow. It will also display the name of the item to best match the overall color of the icon.

Also added icon to bottle o'enchanting, pufferfish and golden apple.

If I forgot any item that give potion effect let me know in a comment on planet minecraft and I'll add it.
(https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/visual-potions/)

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cb07fa0c40cfef75229187e070a49506109276.png)

![Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0c34dbb387934ea7a7e92b0fcbf5bbe08d8f32e.png)
